languages.text: "Ты теперь забытая легенда, старик. Но меня Простор Коронус не предаст забвению так быстро. Уж поверь".

traits.locale_text: "Ты теперь забытая легенда, старик. Но меня Простор Коронус не предаст забвению так быстро. Уж поверь".

languages.text: "You're a forgotten legend now, old man. But the Koronus Expanse will not forget me so quickly, I assure you."
languages.original_text: "Ты теперь забытая легенда, старик. Но меня Простор Коронус не предаст забвению так быстро. Уж поверь".

traits.locale_text: "You're a forgotten legend now, old man. But the Koronus Expanse will not forget me so quickly, I assure you."
"You're a forgotten legend now, old man. But the Koronus Expanse will not forget me so quickly, I assure you."
"You're a forgotten legend now, old man. But the Koronus Expanse will not forget me so quickly, I assure you."

languages.text: 「今やお前は過去の人だ、じいさん。だが、コロヌス・エクスパンスが俺を忘れるのは、お前ほど早くはない」
languages.original_text: "You're in the past now, old man. But I won't be forgotten by the Koronus Expanse as quickly as you are."

traits.locale_text: 「今やお前は過去の人だ、じいさん。だが、コロヌス・エクスパンスが俺を忘れるのは、お前ほど早くはない。」

languages.text: « Vous appartenez aux légendes oubliées, vieillard. Mais les Étendues de Koronus ne m'oublieront pas si aisément, je vous l'assure. »
languages.original_text: "You're a forgotten legend now, old man. But the Koronus Expanse will not forget me so quickly, I assure you."

traits.locale_text: « Vous appartenez aux légendes oubliées, vieillard. Mais les Étendues de Koronus ne m'oublieront pas si aisément, je vous l'assure. »

languages.text: "Sen artık unutulmuş bir efsanesin ihtiyar. Fakat Koronus Enginliği beni o kadar çabuk unutmayacak, seni temin ederim."
languages.original_text: "You're a forgotten legend now, old man. But the Koronus Expanse will not forget me so quickly, I assure you."

traits.locale_text: "Sen artık unutulmuş bir efsanesin ihtiyar. Fakat Koronus Enginliği beni o kadar çabuk unutmayacak, seni temin ederim."

languages.text: "Ihr seid mittlerweile eine vergessene Legende, alter Mann. Aber mich wird die Koronus-Ausdehnung nicht so schnell vergessen, das versichere ich Euch."
languages.original_text: "You're a forgotten legend now, old man. But the Koronus Expanse will not forget me so quickly, I assure you."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr seid mittlerweile eine vergessene Legende, alter Mann. Aber mich wird die Koronus-Ausdehnung nicht so schnell vergessen, das versichere ich Euch."

languages.text: «Eres una leyenda olvidada, vejestorio. Pero la Extensión de Koronus no me olvidará tan rápido como a ti, te lo aseguro».
languages.original_text: "You're a forgotten legend now, old man. But the Koronus Expanse will not forget me so quickly, I assure you."

traits.locale_text: «Eres una leyenda olvidada, vejestorio. Pero la Extensión de Koronus no me olvidará tan rápido como a ti, te lo aseguro».

languages.text: “你现在已经是被遗忘的传奇了，老家伙。但我可不会这么快就被科罗努斯扩区遗忘。”
languages.original_text: "You're a forgotten legend now, old man. But the Koronus Expanse will not forget me so quickly, I assure you."

traits.locale_text: “你现在已经是被遗忘的传奇了，老家伙。但我可不会这么快就被科罗努斯扩区遗忘。”
